title: scrophularia koeiei
intro: Scrophularia koeiei, also known as Korean figwort, is a perennial plant species in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in Eastern medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Scrophularia koeiei include its potential to improve respiratory function, reduce inflammation, and enhance immune system function. Scrophularia koeiei can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat conditions such as bronchitis and asthma.
